content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 3, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
May 3, 2026, focused on stabilizing the ElizaOS framework through critical bug fixes, infrastructure cleanup, and UX improvements. Key achievements include resolving runtime crashes on headless Linux, fixing Telegram bot polling races, and streamlining the Automations Overview. Development also saw significant dependency updates and the consolidation of cloud and plugin workflows to improve maintainability.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Automations & UX Enhancements**
    *   Restored the NL-first hero centerpiece as the primary Automations Overview surface ([#7317](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7317)).
    *   Implemented a clarification roundtrip for n8n workflows, ensuring host-side routing and UI rendering are correctly aligned ([#7316](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7316)).
    *   Introduced the `ConnectorTargetCatalog` service to surface Discord guilds and channels for n8n context ([#7315](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7315)).

*   **Cloud & Auth Stability**
    *   Resolved SIWE authentication issues by bypassing disabled cache singletons and fixing domain resolution for staging/production environments ([#7324](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7324), [#7327](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7327)).
    *   Aligned steward-sync test mocks and fixed typecheck errors to unblock CI/CD pipelines ([#7333](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7333), [#7332](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7332)).
    *   Re-applied critical auth hotfixes lost during the cloud-to-eliza repository migration ([#7288](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7288)).

*   **Dependency & Workflow Consolidation**
    *   Consolidated repository structure by removing legacy Rust/Python components and updating CI workflows ([#7235](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7235)).
    *   Performed extensive dependency updates, including React 19.2.5, Solana/spl-token, and various security patches for Hono, Axios, and others ([#7322](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7322), [#7287](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7287), [#7280](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7280)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Automations:** [#7341](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7341) (Clarification UI), [#7340](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7340) (Trigger deletion fix).
*   **Cloud/Architecture:** [#7337](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7337) (SIWE typing fix), [#7336](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7336) (Clean Architecture migration).
*   **Plugins:** [#7320](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7320), [#7313](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7313), [#7310](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7310), [#7309](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7309), [#7299](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7299), [#7289](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7289) (ExergyNet plugins).
*   **Maintenance:** Various dependency updates including Zod, TypeScript, and TSX ([#7339](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7339), [#7338](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7338), [#7335](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7335), [#7334](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7334)).

## CLOSED ISSUES

*   **Runtime & Stability Fixes**
    *   Resolved process-level segfaults on headless Linux by adding a fallback for the `@napi-rs/keyring` vault ([#7231](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7231)).
    *   Fixed Telegram bot launch errors under Bun by patching Telegraf to handle non-writable error messages ([#7241](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7241)).
    *   Resolved race conditions where multiple consumers polled the same Telegram bot token ([#7245](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7245)).

*   **Authentication & Client Architecture**
    *   Fixed duplicate `MiladyClient` class definitions, ensuring domain augmentations correctly attach to the canonical client prototype ([#7233](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7233), [#7244](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7244)).
    *   Updated `hasCodexCliSubscriptionAuth` to recognize modern `tokens.access_token` shapes and improved fallback logic for fresh installs ([#7238](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7238), [#7243](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7243)).
    *   Bridged dashboard Telegram configuration to the runtime environment to ensure bot tokens are correctly applied ([#7240](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7240)).

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
